nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: New Britain friarbird
nodes.summary: The New Britain friarbird (Philemon cockerelli) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to Papua New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The New Britain friarbird (Philemon cockerelli) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to Papua New Guinea.
